channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: JavaOne 2025 heralds Java’s 30th birthday
item.description: With Java advancing toward its 30th anniversary, Oracle will hold its annual JavaOne conference next week, centering around the Java language, the evolution of the Java platform, and the role of Java in areas such as generative AI and machine learning.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Meta executives called ‘Careless People’ in new book from former Facebook employee-turned-whistleblower
item.description: New York (CNN) — Meta is once again facing allegations from a former employee that a growth-at-all-costs culture has caused offline harm.
item.dc:creator: CNN.com Wire Service, The Mercury News

item.title: 3 keys to defining data sovereignty: Security, privacy, and portability
item.description: Data sovereignty has emerged as a critical concern for businesses and governments, particularly in Europe and Asia.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Amazon will soon be streaming Trump’s ‘The Apprentice’ reality show
item.description: The Apprentice, the long-running reality TV show that boosted Donald Trump’s profile, will begin streaming on Amazon’s Prime Video, the company announced Monday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Capitalizing on AI Potential: Industry-Specific Systems Drive Business Outcomes
item.description: Discover how enterprise technology leaders are leveraging agentic AI to drive business outcomes and outperform competitors.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: People are paying up for this $39 yogurt that went viral on TikTok
item.description: We’re only in the third month of the year and already there have been a number of bizarre food trends go viral on TikTok—from a $19 strawberry to feeding babies spoonfuls of butter. The latest is a yogurt, called Coconut Cult, that costs $39 for a 16 ounce jar.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Alphabet’s Waymo to offer self-driving rides in Silicon Valley
item.description: The company will offer rides to a select group of residents before expanding to more riders in a 27-square-mile swath of the South Bay that includes Mountain View, Los Altos, Palo Alto and parts of Sunnyvale.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: Trump says TikTok deal is in the works. Here's where things stand with the company
item.description: In less than a month, TikTok could have one or a few new owners, be banned again, or simply receive another reprieve to continue operating in the United States.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Rhysida Claims Responsibility for Cyberattacks on Two US Healthcare Organizations
item.description: Ransomware operators Rhysida claim responsibility for cyberattacks on two US healthcare organizations, Sunflower Medical Group and Community Care Alliance, affecting over 300,000 people.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Microsoft Develops Native TypeScript Implementation Based on Google's Go Language
item.description: Microsoft is developing a native TypeScript implementation based on Google’s Go language, promising dramatic improvements in editor startup speed, build times, and memory usage.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: LG reveals US pricing for the LG G5 and LG C5 OLED TVs, and it's great news for OLED fans
item.description: LG announced pricing for the new G5 and C5 OLED TVs, and they cost the same or less than their predecessors.
item.dc:creator: james.davidson@futurenet.com (James Davidson), TechRadar

item.title: LLM benchmarking: How to find the right AI model
item.description: Today, there is hardly any way around AI. But how do companies decide which large language model (LLM) is right for them? The choice is currently wider than ever, the possibilities seemingly endless.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: A Nintendo Switch 2 FCC filing confirms Wi-Fi 6 and NFC support for the upcoming console
item.description: If you have any old amiibo figures lying around, it looks like the Nintendo Switch 2 will have NFC support.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: 6 free LinkedIn Learning courses to help you find a new job
item.description: It’s a . . . well, weird job market out there, to put it diplomatically. If you’ve suddenly found yourself looking for work among what feels like a never-ending onslaught of layoffs, you’re not alone. Now more than ever, standing out is essential to landing your dream job.
item.dc:creator: Doug Aamoth, Fast Company

item.title: Word for Microsoft 365 cheat sheet
item.description: Word has always been the workhorse app of the Microsoft Office suite. Nearly everyone who uses Office ends up using Word at some point, whether it be for writing memos, typing up agendas, creating reports, crafting business correspondence or any of a thousand other uses.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Commvault designa a la veterana de la industria Ha Hoang nueva CIO
item.description: Nueva incorporación a la cúpula directiva de Commvault. El proveedor de soluciones de ciberresiliencia y protección de datos para la nube híbrida ha anunciado el nombramiento de Ha Hoang como su nueva directora de sistemas de la información (CIO, por sus siglas en inglés).
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Achieving unified visibility for effective zero trust implementation
item.description: All components of a zero trust architecture must generate data that is observable, available and able to be correlated within a unified data plane. The post Achieving unified visibility for effective zero trust implementation first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: Utah becomes the first state to pass legislation requiring app stores to verify ages
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) — Utah on Wednesday became the first state to pass legislation requiring app stores to verify users’ ages and get parental consent for minors to download apps to their devices. The bill headed to the desk of Gov.
item.dc:creator: HANNAH SCHOENBAUM, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Judge denies Elon Musk's request to block OpenAI for-profit conversion but welcomes trial
item.description: OAKLAND, Calif. (AP) — A federal judge has denied Elon Musk's request for a court order blocking OpenAI from converting itself to a for-profit company but said she could expedite a trial to consider Musk's claims against the ChatGPT maker and its CEO. U.S.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: AI pioneers who channeled 'hedonistic' machines win computer science's top prize
item.description: Teaching machines in the way that animal trainers mold the behavior of dogs or horses has been an important method for developing artificial intelligence and one that was recognized Wednesday with the top computer science award.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Luxury glass trailer unfolds into a spacious home in just 15 minutes
item.description: Expandable's Touchdown is a designer trailer that promises a luxury off-grid living experience and unfolds into a home in about 15 minutes.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
